_meta.description: RegWatch Matrix populated with real-world electronics ontology blueprints

global_routing_rules.fallback_justification_prompt_blueprint: IA Guideline: Every hardware product must implement standard electronics restrictions (RoHS, REACH, EMC, WEEE) as a baseline safety net.

defined_ontology.business_definition: Any standard electronic product or sub-assembly excluding dedicated standalone power sources.
defined_ontology.operational_scope: Universal base compliance checklist for active hardware components.

defined_ontology.business_definition: Lithium or alkaline button/coin batteries used as primary energy storage.
defined_ontology.operational_scope: Triggers strict child safety frameworks to mitigate swallowing hazards.
expected_deliverables: Mechanical Safety Test Report (Battery Compartment Evaluation)

defined_ontology.business_definition: Any electronic product designed or intended, whether or not exclusively, for use in play by children under 14 years of age.
defined_ontology.operational_scope: Stricter legal status overriding or adding to standard consumer electronics frameworks.
expected_deliverables: Stricter Heavy Metals and Phthalates Chemical Analysis
